name: HIST1_cluster_chr6p22
description: Histone gene cluster HIST1 on chromosome 6p22.2-p21.3. Contains ~55 of the ~70 replication-dependent histone genes in tandem, including multiple paralogs of H1, H2A, H2B, H3, H4 with very high coding-sequence identity. The H4 paralogs in particular share >99% identity over their 309 bp ORFs.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem clustering of H1, H2A, H2B, H3, H4 paralogs; each histone family contains 10-15 paralogs at >95% nucleotide identity; HIST1H4A through HIST1H4L all encode identical H4 protein.
